# Paw Cities

> The global guide to dog-friendly restaurants, cafes, parks, hotels, events, and services.

Paw Cities helps dog owners discover pet-friendly places in cities worldwide. We cover 8 cities with curated, verified listings and a community-driven events calendar.

## Cities

- [Geneva](https://pawcities.com/geneva): Dog-friendly places in Geneva, Switzerland
- [Paris](https://pawcities.com/paris): Dog-friendly places in Paris, France
- [London](https://pawcities.com/london): Dog-friendly places in London, UK
- [Los Angeles](https://pawcities.com/losangeles): Dog-friendly places in Los Angeles, USA
- [New York City](https://pawcities.com/newyork): Dog-friendly places in New York City, USA
- [Barcelona](https://pawcities.com/barcelona): Dog-friendly places in Barcelona, Spain
- [Sydney](https://pawcities.com/sydney): Dog-friendly places in Sydney, Australia
- [Tokyo](https://pawcities.com/tokyo): Dog-friendly places in Tokyo, Japan

## Content Types

Each city page lists dog-friendly establishments across these categories:
- Dog Parks
- Restaurants
- Cafes
- Hotels
- Beaches
- Vets
- Groomers
- Pet Shops
- Activities
- Dog Walkers
- Dog Trainers
- Daycare & Boarding

Each listing includes: name, address, description, dog-friendly features (water bowls, treats, outdoor seating, indoor access, off-leash areas, dog menu, fenced areas, shade), price level, Google rating, business hours, phone, and website.

## Events

Paw Cities maintains a curated calendar of dog-friendly events across all cities. Events include dog walks, adoption fairs, pet expos, yappy hours, dog-friendly brunches, training workshops, and community meetups. Events are shown on each city page and include date, venue, description, and whether they are free.

## For Businesses

Dog-friendly businesses can claim and manage their listing at https://pawcities.com/for-business. Listings can be enhanced with photos, verified badges, and featured placement.

## Key URLs

- Homepage: https://pawcities.com
- Explore all cities: https://pawcities.com/explore
- Business listings: https://pawcities.com/for-business
- Privacy Policy: https://pawcities.com/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://pawcities.com/terms
- Sitemap: https://pawcities.com/sitemap.xml

## Contact

Paw Cities is operated independently. For questions or partnerships, visit https://pawcities.com.
